calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Acknowledgment Of Satisfaction Of Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN A. MOASIB OF GURNEE, MASON & FORESTIERE, LLP, TEL. NO. 1-916-797-3100 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER BALBOA INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Acknowledgment Of Satisfaction Of Judgment is GRANTED. No Opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ru

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Confirming Of Arbitration Award And Entering Judgment In Conformity Therewith
Off Calendar Dec-24-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOHN A. MASON of Gurnee & Daniels, LLP, Tel No. (916) 797-3100 appearing for the Petitioner;
Respondent ADRIENNE THOMAS, Tel No. (510) 866-4882, appearing in pro per.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT ADRIENNE THOMAS' Motion To Set Aside Confirming Of Arbitration Award And Entering Judgment In Conformity Therewith is DENIED. Respondent was repeatedly notified that she was required to deliver courtesy copies of her opposition papers, yet still failed to so prior to the continued hearing date. Further, Respondent has failed to establish any grounds to set aside the Order Confirming Arbitration Award under CCP 473. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098, TEL. NO. (415)717-9768 (302/EHG)

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Awaard
Off Calendar Oct-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN A. MASON OF GUMES & DANIELS LLP, TEL. NO. (916) 797-3100 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ADRIENNE THOMAS, TEL. NO. (510)866-4882, RESPONDENT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER BALBOA INSURANCE COMPANY's Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. Defendant was warned that if courtesy copies of the opposition papers were not received in Dept. 302 by October 6, 2014 the motion would be granted. As of October 23, 2014, the Court has not received courtesy copies of the opposition papers. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Awaard
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Continued To Oct-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER BALBOA INSURANCE COMPANY's Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to October 24, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 per ex parte order, and to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 6, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And Entering Judgment In Conformity
